questions.question: Which of the following is an example of globalisation in India post-1991?
questions.option_4: Entry of multinational companies like Amazon and Apple

questions.question: What was one of the key effects of globalisation on the Indian economy after 1991?
questions.option_4: Entry of foreign companies and capital

questions.question: Employment generation became a focus in later Five-Year Plans. Which Five-Year Plan introduced the Integrated Rural Development Programme (IRDP)?

What is the main aim of globalisation?
questions.option_1: Integrate the Indian economy with the world

questions.question: Which of the following was NOT a part of the New Economic Policy reforms introduced in 1991?
How did globalisation impact Indian industries?
questions.option_4: Gave more competition and modern technology

questions.question: Which sector was the largest contributor to India's GDP between 1947 and 1991?

questions.option_2: Rising imports outpacing exports and widening the trade deficit

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a component of India's core infrastructure sectors (as per Index of Eight Core Industries)?

questions.question: Which of the following was a major fiscal reform introduced in India as part of the 1991 economic reforms?
questions.option_3: Introduction of the Modified Value Added Tax
